name: golang-src
title: golang-src
description:
Go programming language - source files
The Go programming language is an open source project to make programmers more
productive. Go is expressive, concise, clean, and efficient. Its concurrency
mechanisms make it easy to write programs that get the most out of multicore
and networked machines, while its novel type system enables flexible and
modular program construction. Go compiles quickly to machine code yet has the
convenience of garbage collection and the power of run-time reflection. It's a
fast, statically typed, compiled language that feels like a dynamically typed,
interpreted language.
.
This is a dependency package that depends on the default Go standard library
source code, which is needed for the go build process.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-src because Go programming language - source files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-src as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-src with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-src --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
